tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def prs (github__list_pull_requests {:state "open"}))
(def by-repo (frequencies (map :repo prs)))
{:total (count prs)
 :repos (count by-repo)
 :top (apply max-key val by-repo)
 :top-count (val (apply max-key val by-repo))
 :breakdown by-repo}"}
